title: Dynamic Mobs
description: alright, so basically I'm trying to make biome-specific mob textures, that still fit the vanilla feel of the game.
body:
## THIS PACK IS GOING THROUGH AN OVERHAUL 

**THE OLD VERSION OF THE PACK IS STILL AVAILABLE TO DOWNLOAD. THE NEW VERSION OF THE PACK IS MISSING MOST OF THE FEATURES FOR NOW, BUT WILL BE UPDATED. JOIN DISCORD IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS**
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

alright, so basically I'm trying to make biome-specific mob textures, that still fit the vanilla feel of the game. This pack requires Entity Model Features, and Entity Texture Features.

at the moment, I'm nowhere near complete, but I will occasionally post updates, so subscribe.

Feel free to leave any ideas, and they might be added, as I will read comments. constructive criticism is also appreciated

Be sure to join my [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/zDCCaWfxxs), for occasional updates to all of my packs

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

> **ALL NEW FEATURES SO FAR:**
> 
> Orcas - have a chance to replace dolphins
> 
> Highland Cattle - Replace cows in cold biomes and above y=93
> 
> Wart Hogs - Replace pigs in savannah biomes
> 
> Birch Creeper
> 
> Desert Creeper
> 
> Cherry Grove Creeper
> 
> Pale Garden Creeper
> 
> Spruce Creeper

______________________________________________________________________________________________
